title: Extensibility Axis A — novel event_code with context implying bedroom_light intent
description: Paper-eval Extensibility Axis A scenario (required_experiments §5.8). The trigger is `triple_hit` — a button event_code that is canonical-schema-valid but is NOT in the Mac mini's _DIRECT_MAPPING_TABLE (which only enumerates single_click / double_click / long_press). The environmental_context (low illuminance, occupancy_detected, living_room_light=on, bedroom_light=off) is engineered so that rule_only's heuristic cannot fire either: rule_only only proposes light_on for living_room when living_room_light is off, and here it is on. The user's actual intent is light_on bedroom_light. Only an LLM-assisted intent recovery layer can recover that intent without explicit per-input enumeration. The scenario therefore measures perception-side extensibility (Contribution 1) — the deterministic modes are expected to safe-defer (correct behaviour for their constrained input space) while llm_assisted is expected to recover the bedroom-light intent within the existing actuator catalog (Contribution 2 boundary preserved). This scenario does not authorize actuation; it is an evaluation asset only.

steps.description: Publish the novel-event-code context payload through the registry-aligned operational input plane.
Observe routing/intent-recovery outcome. Per-mode expected behaviour: direct_mapping/rule_only correctly safe-defer; llm_assisted recovers light_on bedroom_light within the actuator catalog.

notes: Paper-eval Extensibility Axis A — the input is engineered to DRIFT past what direct_mapping and rule_only can handle, so expected_route_class=CLASS_1 here means the CORRECT recovery (which only llm_assisted can perform). Per-cell pass_rate in the matrix therefore differentiates by intent-recovery mode by design — deterministic modes will register pass_rate=0 (they correctly defer to safe-deferral, observed CLASS_2) while llm_assisted should register a high pass_rate. This is the load-bearing evidence for Contribution 1 in 01_paper_contributions.md.

comparison_conditions tags the three Package A intent-recovery comparison values this scenario exercises. matrix_extensibility.json runs the same scenario three times with different routing_metadata.experiment_mode values.
Exact admissibility assumptions remain defined by canonical policy and schema assets.
Class 1 autonomous execution must remain limited to the canonical low-risk lighting catalog. The LLM may infer the correct target device from context but cannot enlarge the catalog itself.
Doorlock-sensitive behavior must not be represented as Class 1 autonomous execution.
Schema-governed context fixtures referenced by this scenario include environmental_context.doorbell_detected (set false here — non-visitor scenario).
